content.text: Any law to which the Governor has given his or her assent may be disallowed by Her Majesty through a Secretary of State. When such disallowance is notified to the Governor and published in the Gazette, the law shall thereupon cease to have effect.

amendmentHistory.description: Revoked entirely by the Cayman Islands Constitution (Amendment) Order 2020, abolishing the UK power of disallowance of laws
